meta.methodology: Enterprise banking buyer personas derived from sales cycle analysis across 50+ financial institution AI deployments

chief_digital_officer.title: Chief Digital Officer
painPoints: Legacy systems block rapid AI deployment
Siloed data prevents unified customer intelligence
Competing priorities between modernization and innovation
Difficulty demonstrating AI ROI to the board
Talent gap in AI/ML engineering
adoptionBlockers: Unclear regulatory guidance on AI use
Internal resistance from business line owners

head_of_fraud.title: Head of Fraud Operations
painPoints: Alert volume growing faster than team capacity
False positive rates above 95% cause alert fatigue
Cross-channel fraud attacks evade siloed detection
Inability to adapt rules fast enough for new fraud patterns
Regulatory pressure for faster SAR filing
adoptionBlockers: Data privacy constraints on training data

head_of_cx.title: Head of Customer Experience
painPoints: Inconsistent experience across channels
High agent turnover and training costs
Long wait times during peak volumes
Limited personalization capabilities
Manual quality assurance processes
buyingTriggers: Customer migration to competitor digital channels
Strategic initiative to reduce branch dependency
adoptionBlockers: Concern about AI replacing human empathy
Integration with existing CRM and telephony

chief_risk_officer.title: Chief Risk Officer
painPoints: Expanding risk surface from digital transformation
AI/ML model governance gaps
Difficulty quantifying AI-related operational risk
Cross-functional risk aggregation challenges
Increasing regulatory scrutiny of AI decisions
buyingTriggers: Regulatory guidance on AI model governance (SR 11-7)

head_of_compliance.title: Head of Compliance
painPoints: Regulatory change volume overwhelming manual processes
Fragmented compliance tools and data
Audit evidence gathering is labor-intensive
Cross-border regulatory complexity
Difficulty mapping AI use to existing compliance frameworks
buyingTriggers: Consent order or MRA from regulator
Compliance team capacity at breaking point
adoptionBlockers: Skepticism about AI accuracy for compliance
Lack of precedent for AI-assisted compliance decisions
Data quality concerns for regulatory reporting
Budget competition with mandatory compliance programs

contact_center_director.title: Contact Center Director
painPoints: Staffing challenges and high attrition
Training new agents takes 6-8 weeks
Peak volume spikes exceed capacity
Quality consistency across shifts and locations
Pressure to reduce costs while improving service
buyingTriggers: Seasonal volume spikes exceeding staffing models
New product launch requiring rapid agent enablement
Technology refresh cycle for contact center platform
adoptionBlockers: Agent union concerns about job displacement
